mnemonics: AI Ethics Exam: University's Policy (Module 5) is to Schedule the Semester-End Timetable
keyPoints: The final exam is conducted centrally by the university, not by the individual module instructor.
The exam will be held on the date and time specified in the official university timetable.
This is a standard procedure for Module 5 (Ethics and Public Policy for AI) as for other subjects.
commonMistakes: Assuming the exam is online or take-home because it's an AI ethics module; it may be a proctored, in-person exam.
Believing the professor can change the date or time; it is fixed by the university's schedule.
Forgetting to check the official university timetable for the exact exam room and seat number.
